response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks direct C++ development on Windows platforms, which is a mandatory requirement. While they have C++ experience via National Instruments, it is not recent or focused on Windows. Their domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is also absent, and their primary stack revolves around JavaScript, TypeScript, and D. No financial-sector exposure or Summit platform experience is evident.
strengths: Strong general software engineering experience with a focus on testable, high-quality code.
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains quickly.
Demonstrated leadership in organizing workshops and contributing to open-source projects.
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development on Windows (mandatory skill).
No domain experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking.
Limited exposure to SQL Server/Oracle or messaging frameworks relevant to the role.
